reviews.comment:
No tiene buena atención y siempre hay faltante de combustible ,y lo peor es q te tienen 20 minutos haciendo cola con calor  y cuando llega tu turno de cargar te dicen ,no hay combustible ; aunque sea deberían colocarles a los surtidores una cinta para saber q no hay ,algo tan simple como eso ,para no hacer perder el tiempo .

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible and there's always a fuel shortage. The worst part is that they make you wait in line for 20 minutes in the heat, and when it's finally your turn to fill up, they tell you there's no fuel. They should at least put a tape on the pumps to indicate that there's no fuel, something as simple as that, so as not to waste people's time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5cEpuczBBRRAB
